nodes.label: Lucent Brand Identity
nodes.rationale: A minimalist circular ring with a vibrant blue-to-green gradient, establishing a modern, clean, and glowing brand aesthetic for Lucent.

nodes.label: sYntinel Gradient Ring Motif (32x32)
nodes.rationale: A 32x32 pixel PNG version of the circular gradient logo, optimized for standard desktop browser tabs and bookmark bars to represent the sYntinel application.
